name: flux
description: Sidecar-generated stray thoughts for Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Inject sidecar stray thoughts into Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Flux listens to Codex lifecycle hooks, asks a bounded sidecar model for a concise stray thought, and returns additional context without blocking the host agent when anything goes wrong.
defaultPrompt: Install Flux hooks for occasional sidecar stray thoughts.
